<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Angiotensin Ii Acetate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Giapreza is indicated for the treatment of refractory hypotension in adults with septic or other distributive shock who remain hypotensive despite adequate volume restitution and application of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>mitochondrial oxidative phosphorylation disorder due to nuclear DNA anomalies（92.5%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（92.0%）</li>
<li>exocrine pancreatic insufficiency（91.3%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（90.7%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（89.5%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（89.5%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（89.5%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（89.4%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（89.4%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（89.4%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（89.4%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（89.4%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（89.0%）</li>
<li>neuromuscular junction disease（88.5%）</li>
<li>congenital myasthenic syndrome with tubular aggregates（86.7%）</li>
<li>filariasis（86.2%）</li>
<li>cecum villous adenoma（85.0%）</li>
<li>rectosigmoid junction neoplasm（85.0%）</li>
<li>cecum neuroendocrine tumor G1（85.0%）</li>
<li>cecal disease（84.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
